recipe.title: Lemon Garlic Shrimp Linguine
ingredients: 1 lemon (juice + zest), ½ cup heavy cream
½ cup white wine or chicken broth
steps: Cook linguine in salted water per package. Reserve ½ cup pasta water.
Heat olive oil in large pan over medium heat.
Add shrimp, cook 2 min per side until pink. Remove shrimp.
Add wine/broth, scrape bottom, simmer 2 min.
Stir in cream, lemon juice + zest, red pepper flakes.
Add pasta + Parmesan, toss. Add pasta water if needed.
Return shrimp, top with parsley + extra Parmesan.
